subcodes.first_line: O God, my God! Be Thou not far from me, for tribulation upon tribulation hath gathered about me.
subcodes.first_line_orig: فنعم یا الهی ما استغرد بغاء الداود فی حدیقه الزبور من تغنیات ورقاء الانجذاب... الهی الهی لا تبعد عنّی لأنّ الشّدائد بکلّها احاطتنی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for tests and difficulties, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
